title: Pointcinco Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling Headphones, Over Ear Bluetooth 6.0 Wireless Headphones, 50H Playtime, Deep Bass, HiFi Stereo Sound, Lightweight Foldable for Travel, Home and Office(Black)
description: Active Noise Cancelling & Multi-Mode Switching : ANC ON mode blocks ambient noise, with a specific focus on reducing low-frequency disturbances, allowing you to stay focused on music or work even in noisy environments. When noise cancellation is not needed, you can switch to other bluetooth headphones modes:Transparency/ANC OFF.Transparency mode clearly captures surrounding voices and ambient sounds, balancing safety with listening immersion All Day Comfort & Portable : Designed for all-day comfort, the over ear headphones prioritize both softness and wearability. The ear cups are made of memory foam wrapped in protein leather, offering a soft, breathable and fits the earlobe well, so you won’t feel any pressure when wearing it for a long time.The headband automatically adjusts to fit different head shapes, reducing strain on the head. For travel convenience, they fold to 50% of their original size, easily fitting into backpacks or suitcases Latest Bluetooth 6.0 & Stereo Sound : Experience ultra-stable connectivity and lightning-fast pairing with upgraded Bluetooth 6.0 technology. Wireless headphones equipped with powerful 40mm composite diaphragm drivers, noise canceling headphones deliver exceptional clarity and lifelike audio for music, movie dialogues, and calls, creating a truly immersive soundscape whether you're enjoying pop hits or cinematic scores Long Battery Life & Fast Charging : Our noise cancelling headphones have a built-in 600mAh battery, giving you up to 35 hours of playtime with ANC ON and 50 hours with ANC OFF. You can enjoy your music with your Bluetooth headphones without worrying about charging. A full charge takes just 2.5 hours. Perfect for long travel Wireless & Wired : The wireless bluetooth headphones offer two flexible connection options: Bluetooth 6.0 wireless and 3.5mm wired. Bluetooth 6.0 provides a more stable and faster connection, and supports noise suppression. The 3.5mm wired connection ensures compatibility with airplane in-flight entertainment systems, older devices, and other non-Bluetooth environments. Please note: Noise suppression is not available when using the wired connection. › See more product details

title: Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling Headphones 120H Playtime Wireless Headphones Bluetooth 6.0 Over Ear Headphones with 6 ENC HD Call Mic, Hi-Res 360° Spatial Audio ANC Headphone for Travel Workout Black
description: 4-Stage Noise Cancelling System: Wireless bluetooth headphones featuring a 4-layer hybrid Active Noise Cancelling architecture with four high-sensitivity microphones detect and analyze ambient sound in milliseconds. An ultra-fast ANC chip processes noise within 2ms, instantly blocking up to 95% of distractions with a maximum reduction of 45dB. With a light press, ANC headphones instantly bring you back to your own quiet space, whether on a crowded subway, busy flight, or bustling café. 120H All-Day Endurance and Comfort: The H1 Noise canceling headphones deliver up to 120 hours of listening on a single charge, while a 10-minute fast charge provides up to 3 hours of playback for travel, commuting, or multi-day use. Over ear headphones feature a pressure-relieving headband and slow-rebound memory foam ear cushions that evenly distribute weight for long-lasting wear, even during extended use, balancing battery life and comfort, ideal for office, commuting, and long flights. 6-Mic ENC Calls & AI-Enhanced Calls: Wireless headphones featuring 2 feedforward and 4 feedback microphones, the 6-mic array captures and identifies environmental sound at millisecond speed, reducing up to 95% of ambient noise for more comprehensive and natural noise cancellation. Noise cancelling headphones leveraging array collaboration and AI algorithm integration intelligently suppress traffic, wind, and crowd noise, ensuring face-to-face clarity even in busy streets, cafés, or open offices Immersive Hi-Fi Sound & 360° Spatial Audio: Bluetooth headphones deliver balanced high-fidelity audio with deep bass, powered by 40mm dynamic drivers with composite diaphragms and total harmonic distortion below 3%. Built-in gyroscopes and accelerometers enable real-time head tracking, dynamically adjusting sound positioning to keep a stable 3D audio field. Enjoy theater-like immersion for movies, spacious music, and lifelike gameplay. Bluetooth 6.0 & AUX Wired Mode: Over the ear headphones with advanced Bluetooth 6.0 connect up to 2× faster than standard Bluetooth, maintaining a stronger, more stable signal across phones, tablets, and computers to reduce dropouts. Prefer wired? Switch to the included 3.5mm AUX cable for lower latency and stable audio. Headphones wireless in AUX mode deliver high-fidelity sound, ideal for flights, travel, gaming, or studio work, seamlessly combining wireless freedom with wired precision. › See more product details

title: Upgraded Pro‑level Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling Headphones, HD Sound & Big Bass, 2X Softer Comfort, Long ANC Playtime, Wireless Over-Ear Bluetooth Headphones Perfect for Home Office|Travel|Pair
description: Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation & Immersive Sound: Engineered by Vonaural, these hybrid active noise cancelling headphones are designed to reduce everyday ambient noise while preserving sound detail and clarity. Our carefully tuned hybrid ANC system works alongside dual high-performance drivers to deliver clear highs, balanced mids, and deep, controlled bass—so you can stay focused and fully immersed whether commuting, working, or unwinding at home Premium Listening Experience & Rich Sound Detail: Enjoy a refined listening experience with Vonaural expertly tuned drivers that deliver crisp highs, clear mids, and deep, punchy bass.Whether you’re listening to music, watching movies, or taking calls, these wireless headphones over ear noise cancelling provide balanced, immersive sound with excellent clarity and detail—bringing your favorite content to life at home, at work, or on the go Clear Calls & Easy Controls: Equipped with built-in microphones and noise reduction technology, Vonaural bluetooth over the ear headphones ensure your voice is captured clearly during hands-free calls and online meetings. Intuitive onboard controls allow you to adjust volume, change tracks, answer calls, and switch noise cancelling modes effortlessly—giving you full control without reaching for your phone All-Day Comfort for Extended Wear: Designed for long listening sessions, Vonaural over-ear Bluetooth headphones feature ultra-soft ear cushions and an adjustable headband that evenly distributes pressure for a comfortable, secure fit. The lightweight design helps reduce fatigue, making them ideal for home office use, long flights, online meetings, and daily wear Long-Lasting Power & Reliable Wireless Performance: Built to keep up with your day, Vonaural noise-canceling headphones wireless offer up to 35 hours of playtime on a single charge. Advanced Bluetooth technology provides a fast, stable connection with low latency and a dependable wireless range—so your music, calls, and videos stay smooth and uninterrupted wherever you go › See more product details
